Title: Establishes the "responsible fast food and public health act"
Summary: Establishes the "responsible fast food and public health act" which assesses annual fees against fast food chains to be used for educational outreach on obesity and nutrition; creates the childhood nutrition and obesity prevention fund.
LawCode: Add Art 2 Title 5-A §§264 & 264-a, Pub Health L; add §99-uu, St Fin L
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the public health law and the state finance law, in relation to establishing the "responsible fast food and public health act"
